message:
refactor(web): improve semantic HTML and accessibility for interactive elements

Replaces non-semantic div-with-role patterns with appropriate HTML elements:

VirtualizedOutput.tsx:
- Changes row container from <div role="button"> to <button type="button">
- Removes redundant tabIndex and keyDown handler (button handles natively)
- Maintains existing click behavior and styling

ProfileList.tsx (CAAM):
- Changes menu backdrop from <div role="button"> to <button type="button">
- Keeps Escape key handler for UX, removes Enter (button handles click)

DashboardGrid.tsx:
- Changes drop zones from <div role="region"> to <section> elements
- Changes widget containers from <div role="article"> to <article> elements
- Removes redundant role attributes (implicit in semantic elements)

These changes improve:
- Screen reader experience (proper element semantics)
- Keyboard navigation (native button behavior)
- DOM cleanliness (fewer ARIA attributes needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
